query:
SELECT u.name as university_name, COUNT(p.id) as project_count 
FROM universities u 
LEFT JOIN research_projects p ON u.id = p.university_id 
GROUP BY u.id, u.name 
ORDER BY project_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT u.name as university_name, COUNT(p.id) as project_count 
FROM universities u 
LEFT JOIN research_projects p ON u.id = p.university_id 
GROUP BY u.id, u.name 
ORDER BY project_count DESC;
